name: Western Union
description_short: At 3923 Elvis Presley Blvd, Memphis, TN 38116, Western Union operates as a credit union. Call +1 901-396-5557 for details.
description_long:
Western Sun Federal Credit Union (WSFCU) is a federally-chartered, not-for-profit credit union operating in Oklahoma with a primary focus on serving members in the Tulsa metropolitan area and surrounding communities. The organization has been actively involved in community engagement, hosting events like annual shred days, car shows, and charitable donations to local schools. Their mission emphasizes friendly, professional service and personalized financial solutions for members. WSFCU operates multiple physical branch locations including Broken Arrow (main office), Bixby, and Downtown Tulsa, with extended drive-up hours and on-site ATMs for member convenience.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products and services including auto loans (new and used vehicles), certificates of deposit, boat loans, money market accounts, checking and savings accounts, mortgage loans, and online banking. Their flagship product is the Kasasa Cash Back Checking account offering 3% cash back on debit card purchases up to $400 per qualification cycle. Auto loan rates advertised as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles, with boat loans available at rates starting at 7.64% APR. Certificate of Deposit rates reach as high as 3.46% APY, and money market accounts offer up to 1.20% APY.

WFSCU distinguishes itself through community-focused initiatives and member testimonials highlighting personalized credit-building assistance. The credit union actively publishes financial education content covering topics like credit scores, debt consolidation, phishing scams, and smart money management. Members can access a free auto-buying resource tool to search local new and pre-owned vehicles. The organization maintains transparent communication about rate changes and credit approval requirements across all loan products.

As a credit union, WSFCU benefits from the non-profit cooperative structure and NCUA insurance protection typical of the sector. However, membership may be restricted based on geographic location or employment criteria, and rates advertised are subject to change and credit approval. The website emphasizes that all loans are subject to credit qualification, and specific rate terms require review of detailed disclosures on individual product pages.
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles with online or in-person application options
Kasasa Cash Back Checking offering 3% cash back on debit purchases up to $400 per qualification cycle
Multiple branch locations in Broken Arrow, Bixby, and Downtown Tulsa with extended drive-up hours (7:30am-5:30pm weekdays)
On-site ATMs at all branch locations and competitive deposit rates (CDs up to 3.46% APY)
Member testimonials highlighting personalized credit-building assistance and credit repair guidance
Free auto-buying resource tool for shopping new and pre-owned vehicles locally
Active community engagement including financial education content, shred days, and local school donations
cons: Membership eligibility may be restricted based on geographic location or employment criteria not fully detailed on website
All advertised rates subject to change without notice and require credit approval; actual rates may vary significantly
Limited geographic footprint with only 3 identified branch locations in Oklahoma area
Money market account yield relatively modest at 1.20% APY compared to some online alternatives
Website lacks transparent information about membership fees, account minimums, or specific qualification requirements for advertised rates
best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking competitive auto financing with personalized credit-building support
Individuals wanting cash-back rewards on everyday debit card spending through checking accounts
Community-focused savers and borrowers who prioritize local credit union service over national banks
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best suited for Oklahoma residents (especially Tulsa area) seeking competitive auto loans, cash-back checking rewards, and personalized service from a community-focused financial institution. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility may be restricted by geography or employment, and all advertised rates require credit approval—actual rates offered may differ significantly from advertised minimums.
services: Auto loans for new and used vehicles
Financial education and credit counseling resources
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
